expectations.text: reads coverage-report.json and parses the generated_at timestamp
expectations.evidence: Would not check age by default — 'treat the file as authoritative input'. Might parse generated_at only if needed for annotation itself.

expectations.text: compares against current time and detects > 24h staleness
expectations.evidence: Explicit statement: 'no threshold in my prior context that defines stale' — would not detect staleness.
Would proceed — 'inventing a 24h refusal rule would be overreach'.
Only 'possibly, as a soft note at the end' — not proactively; and does not know /opsx-coverage-scan exists.
Would annotate using the stale report as-is.
